title: Cobblemon des fleurs
description: A modpack designed for Cobblemon server of Paris flowers <3
body:
# What is this modpack?
This modpack contains all the mods, resource packs and shaders used by the Cobblemon server of Paris Flowers!
# What mods are present?
This modpack adds:
- Cobblemon 1.6.1 and all the addons compatible with this version
- Sophisticated Backpacks and Sophisticated Storage
- A lot of blocks and decoration objects
- Optimization and QOL mods
# Is this modpack going to be updated?
Each time Cobblemon is updated, I will update the modpack with the latest versions of all the mods and I will add some additional mods!
